title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
summary: Trump criticized Spain for insufficient NATO contributions during a defense summit in Turkey, demanding trade cuts. The remarks underscore ongoing tensions over NATO burden-sharing and Trump's transactional approach to alliances.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.

zh.title: 特朗普：不想与西班牙有任何关系，要求切断所有贸易
zh.summary: 特朗普在土耳其国防峰会上批评西班牙的北约贡献不足，要求削减贸易。此言论凸显了北约分担成本的持续紧张局势和特朗普对联盟的交易性态度。

title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
summary: China warned that specific versions of Claude Code contain back-door vulnerabilities that could expose sensitive data to remote servers. The allegation raises security concerns amid ongoing U.S.-China tech competition.
content: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.

zh.title: 中国警告Anthropic的Claude Code存在AI安全风险
zh.summary: 中国警告称Claude Code的某些版本存在后门漏洞，可能泄露敏感数据到远程服务器。这一指控在美中科技竞争加剧的背景下引发了对安全的担忧。

title: SambaNova hits $11 billion valuation as investors back Nvidia chip challengers
summary: AI chip startup SambaNova reached an $11 billion valuation in a financing round led by General Atlantic, as companies seek alternatives to Nvidia's dominance in AI semiconductors.
content: SambaNova is valued at $11 billion after fresh financing led by General Atlantic, as AI chip startups look to challenge Nvidia.

zh.title: SambaNova估值达110亿美元，投资者支持英伟达芯片竞争对手
zh.summary: AI芯片初创公司SambaNova在由General Atlantic领投的融资中估值达到110亿美元，因为企业寻求英伟达在AI半导体领域垄断地位的替代方案。

title: Denmark PM vows to defend Greenland after Trump revives push for U.S. control
summary: Danish Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen rejected Trump's renewed push for U.S. control of Greenland, reaffirming Denmark's sovereignty over the territory amid diplomatic tensions.
content: Danish Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen delivered a rebuke to President Donald Trump's latest push for U.S. control of Greenland.

zh.title: 丹麦首相誓言保卫格陵兰，特朗普重新推动美国控制
zh.summary: 丹麦首相梅特·弗雷德里克森拒绝了特朗普关于美国控制格陵兰的新推动，在外交紧张局势中重申了丹麦对该领土的主权。

title: Trains and emergency calls affected after major outage at Australia's largest telecoms company
summary: Australia's largest telecommunications company suffered a major outage affecting trains and emergency services, with servers at Sydney and Melbourne data centers identified as the culprit though the root cause remains unknown.
content: Servers at data centres in Sydney and Melbourne were to blame but the exact cause remains unknown.

zh.title: 澳大利亚最大电信公司大规模宕机后，列车和紧急电话受到影响
zh.summary: 澳大利亚最大的电信公司遭遇大规模宕机，影响了列车和紧急服务，悉尼和墨尔本数据中心的服务器被确定为罪魁祸首，但根本原因仍不清楚。

title: 'Don't fool with us': NATO allies put on a united front as they prepare to meet Trump
summary: NATO members are presenting a united front ahead of their meeting with President Trump, with NATO chief Mark Rutte announcing the alliance's transition into a "NATO 3.0" era.
content: NATO chief Mark Rutte said Wednesday that the alliance was entering its "NATO 3.0" era.

zh.title: "别惹我们"：北约盟国在准备与特朗普会面时团结一致
zh.summary: 北约成员国在与特朗普总统会面前展现团结阵线，北约秘书长马克·吕特宣布联盟进入"北约3.0"时代。

title: Samsung-backed AI chip firm Rebellions targets IPO in South Korea next year, CEO tells CNBC
summary: Samsung-backed AI chip firm Rebellions plans to go public on South Korea's KOSPI exchange next year, according to CEO Sunghyun Park, as the company seeks to compete in the chip market.
content: Sunghyun Park, CEO of Rebellions, told CNBC that the company is leaning toward a listing on the KOSPI over the KOSDAQ.

zh.title: 三星支持的AI芯片公司Rebellions计划明年在韩国IPO，CEO告诉CNBC
zh.summary: 三星支持的AI芯片公司Rebellions计划明年在韩国KOSPI交易所上市，CEO Sunghyun Park表示，该公司正寻求在芯片市场上竞争。

title: Virgin Media fined £28m for preventing customers from cancelling contracts
summary: Virgin Media was fined £28 million for mishandling customer cancellation requests over nearly three years, with regulators finding millions of phone calls were improperly processed.
content: Millions of phone calls from customers were "likely mishandled" over nearly a three-year period, the regulator says.

zh.title: Virgin Media因阻止客户取消合同被罚2800万英镑
zh.summary: Virgin Media因近三年来处理不当客户取消请求被罚2800万英镑，监管部门发现数百万通电话处理不当。

title: Oil jumps as U.S. 'powerful strikes' against Iran risk stoke Mideast tensions
summary: Oil prices jumped following U.S. strikes on Iran in retaliation for attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, intensifying Middle East regional tensions.
content: Oil prices rose on Wednesday after the U.S. launched fresh strikes on Iran in retaliation for attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗"强有力打击"可能加剧中东局势，油价随之上涨
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗进行打击以报复对霍尔木兹海峡商业船只的攻击后，油价上涨，加剧了中东地区紧张局势。

title: Australia dock workers call for 28-hour week in AI talks
summary: Australian dock workers are calling for a 28-hour work week as unions warn that automation and AI testing across ports put workers at risk of job displacement.
content: A union says workers are "in the crosshairs" of automation as AI is being tested across ports.

zh.title: 澳大利亚码头工人在AI谈判中呼吁每周28小时工作制
zh.summary: 澳大利亚码头工人要求每周工作28小时，工会警告称港口的自动化和AI测试可能使工人面临失业风险。

title: CNBC Daily Open: Dispatch from NATO, U.S. strikes Iran and Le Pen is back
summary: This news roundup covers three major geopolitical developments: escalating U.S.-NATO tensions at a defense summit, fresh strikes on Iran threatening Middle East stability, and Marine Le Pen's return to French politics.
content: Tensions between the U.S. and its allies heat up at the NATO Summit, while a fresh wave of stikes threatens the ceasefire in Iran.

zh.title: CNBC每日开盘：北约动向、美国打击伊朗和勒庞回归
zh.summary: 本新闻综述涵盖三项重大地缘政治发展：防务峰会上升级的美国-北约紧张局势、对伊朗的新一轮打击威胁中东稳定，以及玛丽娜·勒庞回归法国政治。

title: Apple begins testing CXMT chips for devices sold in China, FT says
summary: Apple has begun testing domestically-made CXMT chips for devices sold in the Chinese market, according to Financial Times reporting, as the company develops alternatives amid trade tensions.

zh.title: 苹果开始测试用于中国市场的CXMT芯片
zh.summary: 据英国《金融时报》报道，苹果公司已开始测试国内生产的CXMT芯片用于中国市场设备，在贸易紧张局势下开发替代方案。

title: Airbnb data identifies illegal social home sublets
summary: Airbnb's data analysis identified nearly 6,000 social homes illegally listed on short-term rental platforms, highlighting concerns about housing availability and regulatory compliance.
content: Nearly 6,000 social homes are thought to be illegally listed on short-term rental platforms.

zh.title: Airbnb数据识别非法社交住宅转租
zh.summary: Airbnb的数据分析发现近6000套社交住宅被非法列在短期租赁平台上，突出了对住房供应和监管合规性的担忧。

title: Lawmakers probe growing use of Chinese AI models in U.S. companies
summary: A House Committee investigation is examining the growing adoption of Chinese-made AI models by U.S. companies, focusing on potential security risks and competitive implications.
content: An ongoing House Committee investigation is probing the risks involved in the rise of AI built in China.

zh.title: 议员调查中国AI模型在美国公司中的使用增加
zh.summary: 众议院委员会正在调查美国公司对中国人工智能模型日益增长的采用，重点关注潜在的安全风险和竞争影响。

title: Chinese autonomous-driving firm Momenta rises 3% in Hong Kong stock debut
summary: Chinese autonomous-driving firm Momenta made its Hong Kong stock exchange debut on Wednesday, with shares rising 3%. The listing marks a significant milestone for the Chinese autonomous vehicle sector amid growing global competition in self-driving technology.
content: Chinese autonomous driving firm Momenta debuted on the Hong Kong stock exchange on Wednesday, rising 3%.

zh.title: 中国自动驾驶公司Momenta在香港股市首秀上涨3%
zh.summary: 中国自动驾驶公司Momenta于周三在香港交易所首次上市，股价上涨3%。此次上市标志着中国自动驾驶汽车行业在全球自动驾驶技术竞争加剧的背景下取得了重大里程碑。

title: China's rare missile test will push wary Asia-Pacific countries to close ranks, analysts say
summary: China conducted a rare ballistic missile test into the Pacific Ocean, prompting regional analysts to predict closer defense coordination among Asia-Pacific nations. The test signals growing military tensions and is expected to accelerate defense partnerships among wary regional powers.
content: China's rare launch of a ballistic missile launch into the Pacific will push regional powers to deepen their defense ties.

zh.title: 分析人士表示中国罕见的导弹试验将促使谨慎的亚太地区国家加强团结
zh.summary: 中国进行了一次罕见的弹道导弹试验，向太平洋发射，促使区域分析人士预测亚太地区国家之间的防务协调将更加密切。这次试验表明军事紧张局势加剧，预计将加速谨慎的地区大国之间的防务伙伴关系。

title: Plot twist: Gen Z is buying houses after all. Here’s how they’re doing it.
summary: Despite elevated housing costs, younger generations are finding ways to enter the property market. The article explores the strategies and financial approaches Gen Z homebuyers are using to overcome affordability challenges.
content: Despite soaring housing costs, younger buyers are finding a way in.

zh.title: 剧情反转：Z世代毕竟在购买房产。他们是这样做的。
zh.summary: 尽管房产成本高企，年轻一代正在寻找进入房产市场的途径。该文章探讨了Z世代购房者用来克服可负担性挑战的策略和财务方法。

title: Hundreds of jobs at risk as John Lewis plans to cut some services
summary: British retail giant John Lewis is planning to cut some services with potential job losses expected in autumn, pending approval of redundancy plans. The company has not finalized the decisions but has indicated the cuts are likely to proceed.
content: No final decision has been made but the job cuts will happen in the autumn if the redundancy plans are approved.

zh.title: 数百个工作岗位面临风险，约翰·路易斯计划裁减部分服务
zh.summary: 英国零售巨头约翰·路易斯计划裁减部分服务，预期秋季会出现潜在的裁员，这取决于冗余计划的批准。该公司尚未最终确定决定，但已表示这些裁减可能会继续进行。

title: Rivian’s stock sale triggers worst rout for the shares in nearly two years
summary: Rivian's stock plummeted 18%, marking its worst performance in nearly two years following a secondary stock offering. Wall Street's concerns about the EV maker's cash position and financial sustainability drove the sharp decline.
content: Rivian’s stock falls 18% as Wall Street frets about the EV maker’s cash troubles.

zh.title: Rivian股票发行引发近两年来最大跌幅
zh.summary: Rivian股票暴跌18%，创近两年来最差表现，此前公司进行了二次股票发行。华尔街对这家电动汽车制造商的现金状况和财务可持续性的担忧推动了股价的急剧下跌。
